entities.name: Quality Rubric
entities.context: Detailed scoring framework for evaluating content quality

entities.name: Voice Fidelity
entities.context: Scoring category worth 40 points covering tone and authenticity

entities.name: Warmth
entities.context: Sub-component of Voice Fidelity measuring approachability and conversational tone

entities.name: Confidence
entities.context: Sub-component of Voice Fidelity measuring balanced authority without overstatement

entities.name: Precision
entities.context: Sub-component of Voice Fidelity measuring specificity with concrete details

entities.name: Technical Excellence
entities.context: Scoring category worth 10 points covering length, structure, and grammar

relationships.context: Warmth is a measured component of Voice Fidelity (10 pts)
Confidence is a measured component of Voice Fidelity (10 pts)
Precision is a measured component of Voice Fidelity (15 pts)
Voice Fidelity is a primary evaluation dimension in the rubric
Technical Excellence is a primary evaluation dimension in the rubric
